Here, you can see Bernard Jenkin's latest speeches and appearances in Parliament (provided by theyworkforyou):

Electricity: Suffolk | Department for Energy Security and Net Zero | Written Answers

To ask the Secretary of State for Energy Security and Net Zero, what estimate he has made of the proportion of UK electricity that will pass

UK-EU Relations | Cabinet Office | Commons debates

Is the House right to understand that the Government believe that the economy has grown significantly less—measurably less—as a result of le

Peter Mandelson: Government Appointment | Commons debates

Will the hon. Member give way?

Peter Mandelson: Government Appointment | Commons debates

I am most grateful to the hon. Gentleman, whom I know as a friend across the House, as we have worked together positively on many things.

I am most grateful to the hon. Gentleman, whom I know as a friend across the House, as we have worked together positively on many things.
